title: dactylorhiza majalis var. occidentalis
intro: Dactylorhiza majalis var. occidentalis, also known as the western marsh orchid, is a type of orchid species that is native to western Europe and western North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza majalis var. occidentalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin irritations.
